title: Connection tracking for hijacked connections is not implemented correctly
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**
IdleTracker registers hijacked connections as active connections. This is against specification which says:

```
    // StateHijacked represents a hijacked connection.
    // This is a terminal state. It does not transition to StateClosed.
    StateHijacked
```

If connection is hijacked, it should be removed from active connection pool rather than adding to it.

comments.body:
#6918 Combines contents of my both pull requests and fixes connection counters for v2 interfaces. If there is hijacking in libpod api, I'll leave fixing that to others.

I'll be away for ~4weeks for summer holidays. So if this needs rebasing - it won't happen unless you take over my repo :-)
